const.name: trcfile
const.remark: Specifies trace filename: -t [file] (Use relative only if using http service.)

const.name: initfield
const.remark: Activate field initialization: flip all switches twice

const.name: version
const.remark: Shows version info and stops rocrail.

const.name: doc
const.remark: Writes HTML documentation and stops rocrail.

const.name: service
const.remark: Try to start rocrail as Windows Service. (Windows only)

const.name: installservice
const.remark: Try to install rocrail as Windows Service. (Windows only)

const.name: deleteservice
const.remark: Try to uninstall rocrail as Windows Service. (Windows only)

const.name: mqtt
const.remark: Use a MQTT broker if one is found.

const.name: netdev
const.remark: Network device for getting the MAC address: -detdev [devicename]

const.name: virtual
const.remark: Replace all digint libs with the virtual CS.

const.name: initfield
const.remark: Field initialization: flip all switches twice

const.name: GoTo
const.remark: Uppercase name because goto is a C statement

var.name: path
var.remark: Server reply with the absolute path.

var.name: quality
var.remark: Signal quality reported by loco over railcom.

var.name: dipid
var.remark: Reference to an existing DIP definition.

var.name: uid
var.remark: The unique ID in case of an export.

var.name: class
var.remark: Module class in case of an export.

var.name: nr
var.remark: Macro number in case of export.

var.name: accevent
var.remark: To check in the model if it was an accessory event.

var.name: inithour
var.remark: Schedual initial planned start hour: scid+starthour is key.

var.name: delay
var.remark: Schedule delay reported by the train.

var.name: endpuls
var.remark: use the down flank of the puls

var.name: from
var.remark: from block id (csv list for more blocks)

var.name: byroute
var.remark: Comming from block x by route y. (optional)

var.name: unlockonfree
var.remark: Unlock the route or block on free. (endpuls)

var.name: normalspeedonfree
var.remark: Switch to normal train speed on free. (endpuls, reducespeed)

var.name: lcid
var.remark: Optional loco ID for use with competition.

var.name: createmodplan
var.remark: Create a modplan if the planfile does not jet exist.

var.name: maxbackup
var.remark: Max. number of plan backup files.

var.name: backuppath
var.remark: Location of the plan file backups.

var.name: keypath
var.remark: Location of the donation key file.

var.name: soundplayerlocation
var.remark: Add loco location as second parameter.

var.name: decpath
var.remark: reference decoder specifications to this path

var.name: runasroot
var.remark: Force rocrail to run as root.

var.name: ptiid
var.remark: IID to use with programming; using default in case not set.

var.name: lciid
var.remark: IID to use for mobile decoders; using default in case not set.

var.name: dpiid
var.remark: IID to use for dispathing a loco; using default in case not set.

var.name: sviid
var.remark: IID to use with LN SV programming; using default in case not set.

var.name: poweroffonexit
var.remark: Turn track power off on server exit.

var.name: poweronatinit
var.remark: Turn track power on at server init.

var.name: shutdownonexit
var.remark: Shutdown command station on server exit.

var.name: resetspfx
var.remark: Reset all loco functions and speed at startup.

var.name: netroutes
var.remark: Try to get the net routes from the master.

var.name: repeat
var.remark: Repeat interval in ms for the updown axis. (value 0 disables the repeat)

http.remark: Http interface for configure the xspooler.

var.name: port
var.remark: Port number for server socket. Deactivated when 0.

var.name: path
var.remark: Path where to look for external HTML documents.

var.name: port
var.remark: Port number server socket for webclients. Deactivated when 0.

var.name: svgpath1
var.remark: scan this path for svg symbols

var.name: svgpath2
var.remark: scan this path for svg symbols

var.name: svgpath3
var.remark: scan this path for svg symbols

var.name: svgpath4
var.remark: scan this path for svg symbols

var.name: svgpath5
var.remark: scan this path for svg symbols

service.remark: Service for remote Rocrail to negotiate about a loc destination.

var.name: sname
var.remark: Servicer name to use in NetReq and NetRsp.

var.name: automatic
var.remark: Trace level for extra info in automatic mode.

var.name: protpath
var.remark: Protocol path; Where to write the trace files. (Use relative only if using http service.) Path is relative to pwd!

var.name: unique
var.remark: Create a unique trace filename at startup.

var.name: nr
var.remark: Number of continuous trace files. In case of 0 or 1: All traces are written in one file disregarding filesize.

var.name: invoke
var.remark: External program or script to invoke on exception file creation.

var.name: invokeasync
var.remark: The invokation will take place in a separate thread.

var.name: monitoring
var.remark: Trace with monitor level instead of info.

var.name: ctsretry
var.remark: wait for CTS line to come up.

var.name: rtsdisabled
var.remark: Disables RTS line for USB converters. (Depends on type if this is needed.)

var.name: sw2st
var.remark: Use route commands instead of switch. WLANmaus.

var.name: ping
var.remark: Ping interval for a [Dead man's switch].

var.name: absent
var.remark: Set absent flag in case a loco did leave a block.

var.name: fbmod
var.remark: Number of connected feedback modules of 8 inputs.

var.name: stress
var.remark: send every 10ms a loconet packet to stress the network

var.name: identdelay
var.remark: Delay before sending a low sensor state for ident codes.

var.name: fastclock
var.remark: send fast clock commands to the connected command station

var.name: ignorebusy
var.remark: ignore the busy message from command station

var.name: locolist
var.remark: Initial send the digint the list of locos.

var.name: switchlist
var.remark: Initial send the digint the list of switches.

var.name: declist
var.remark: Initial send the digint the list of decoders.

var.name: sensorlist
var.remark: Initial send the digint the list of sensors.

var.name: fbleft
var.remark: HSI-88 number of modules of 8 inputs on left port

var.name: fbmiddle
var.remark: HSI-88 number of modules of 8 inputs on middle port

var.name: fbright
var.remark: HSI-88 number of modules of 8 inputs on right port

var.name: smooth
var.remark: HSI-88 smooth out fb contact noice; fb must be at least 100ms low before sending event.

var.name: nonebidiunits
var.remark: Comma separated list of none BiDi sensor units of 8.

var.name: pw4acc
var.remark: Power must be on for accessory commands.

var.name: psleep
var.remark: Sleep between polling of the feedback units.

var.name: ignorepoweroffonghost
var.remark: Ignore power off commands triggered by ghost trains.

var.name: connectionretry
var.remark: Number of retries before give up.

var.name: keepalive
var.remark: Seconds between the keep alive requests.

var.name: coil_input
var.remark: Report coil event as input instead of output.

var.name: fastclock
var.remark: Fast clock flag read from SO 2.

var.name: manual2bidib
var.remark: Map MSG_CS_ACCESSORY_MANUAL messages to BiDiB commands.

var.name: resetmanop
var.remark: Reset a manually operated accessory to its known state.

var.name: srcpbusGL_ns
var.remark: nmra dcc generic loco with short addr bus

var.name: srcpbusGL_nl
var.remark: nmra dcc generic loco with long addr bus

var.name: id
var.remark: RocNet sender ID, 1 is default for Rocrail.(Host)

var.name: lcbus
var.remark: Default loco bus if greater then zero.

var.name: nrpulses
var.remark: Number of sensor pulses per wheel rotation.

var.name: modcnt
var.remark: LinkS88 number of connected modules. (At least one: Itself.)

var.name: csnodeid
var.remark: Use CS node ID in case of bus==0

var.name: sodcount
var.remark: Start of Day input address count.

var.name: fonfof
var.remark: Use the new opcodes for controlling functions.

var.name: loadertime
var.remark: Sleep time between boot loader lines.

var.name: linefeed
var.remark: Add a linefeed at the end of the ASCII frames.

const.name: mtyp_canservo
const.remark: 8 servo driver (on canacc8 or similar hardware)

var.name: nrevtvar
var.remark: Number of event variable per event.

var.name: purgetime
var.remark: Idle time for purg a slot.

var.name: shortcutdelay
var.remark: Shortcut events shorter than this time is ignored

var.name: gpio
var.remark: GPIO pin for DCC output; Default GPIO20 in 38.

var.name: purgetime
var.remark: set to zero if the command station does not purge

var.name: slotping
var.remark: Enable slot ping if purge time is not zero.

var.name: reportaddr
var.remark: global addres on which sensors are reported

var.name: swack
var.remark: Check long ack for switch commands.

var.name: swsleep
var.remark: Number of ms sleep between switch command retries.

var.name: GBM16xn
var.remark: 8 bit loco addressing and direction bit.

var.name: opcwait
var.remark: How many packets to wait before giving up on slot data.

var.name: echotimeout
var.remark: How long to wait for ULNI for receiving the echo.

var.name: store
var.remark: set by client to signal to store the options in the command station

var.name: purge
var.remark: activate slot purging (purgtime from parent node)

var.name: iid
var.remark: redirect commands to this interface ID

var.name: onlyfirstmaster
var.remark: Only the first client is master.

var.name: mqtthost
var.remark: Broker host name or IP address.

var.name: mqttport
var.remark: Port number of the Broker socket.

var.name: mqttgrouping
var.remark: Use item names in the tree for broadcasting.

var.name: wiowd_exclude
var.remark: CSV of WIO IDs which should not trigger a power off.

var.name: checkpermdest
var.remark: Check route and block permissions of the destination.

var.name: uselocation4destination
var.remark: Use locations in the last schedule entry.

var.name: avoidtermblocks
var.remark: Skip terminal blocks for none commuter trains.

var.name: startonlywithschedule
var.remark: A go command will skipped if no finder schedule is set.

var.name: setblockexitside
var.remark: Set the block exit side in the schedule entries.

var.name: genunregsensor
var.remark: Create a sensor object after model init if not exist.

var.name: resetscheduleonstop
var.remark: Reset the schedule on stop automatic mode.

var.name: checkdecoders
var.remark: Check if all decoders are online before allowing auto mode.

var.name: checkrestore
var.remark: Check if all locos have restored functions and speed before allowing auto mode.

var.name: usefinder
var.remark: Use the finder for the goto destination.

var.name: calcvirtualtimer
var.remark: Calculate virtual timer by route length, block length and kmh.

var.name: initfieldpower
var.remark: Set global power on before init field.

var.name: ignevt
var.remark: Ignore multiple events for the same state if comming within this number of 10ms ticks.

var.name: loccnfg
var.remark: send loco config commands to the CS

var.name: secondnextblock
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block.

var.name: enablebkpower
var.remark: Enable block power check on lock.

var.name: eventtimeout
var.remark: Time to wait for a next event. Disabled when set to zero.

var.name: signalreset
var.remark: Time to wait for resetting the signals of previous block. Disabled when set to zero.

var.name: routeswtime
var.remark: Time between switch commands in routes.

var.name: disablerouteVreduce
var.remark: Global disable route speed reducing by thrown switches.

var.name: greenaspect
var.remark: Use green aspect instead of yellow if next block has red.

var.name: skipsetsw
var.remark: Skip switch commands in routes for switches already in model position.

var.name: skipsetsg
var.remark: Skip signal commands for signals already in model position.

var.name: semaphorewait
var.remark: Time needed by a semaphore to get in position.

var.name: signalwait
var.remark: Time needed by a signal to set another aspect.

var.name: useident
var.remark: Use bi-directional identifier for set in block.

var.name: poweroffonidentmismatch
var.remark: Power off if the ident code does not match.

var.name: poweroffatghost
var.remark: Power off a ghost is detected when no ghost is accepted.

var.name: autooffatghost
var.remark: Automatic mode off at ghost detection.

var.name: ebreakatghost
var.remark: Power off a ghost is detected when no ghost is accepted.

var.name: keepghost
var.remark: Keep ghost state until manual reset.

var.name: locostartgap
var.remark: Time between signalling loco's to start in auto mode.

var.name: disablesteal
var.remark: Disable throttle to steal loco control.

var.name: blockinitpause
var.remark: Pause between the block init commands.

var.name: allowzerothrottleid
var.remark: Allow broadcasting event coming from zero throttle IDs.

var.name: stopnonecommuter
var.remark: Stop auto mode for none commuter trains in terminal stations.

var.name: syncroutetimeout
var.remark: Timeout in ms for synchronizing routes.

var.name: closenoevents
var.remark: Close block if no event is defined.

var.name: selectshortestblock
var.remark: Select shortest block in case block and train length are set.

var.name: redirecttomaster
var.remark: Redirect commands send to a slave consist member to the master loco.

const.name: fbmods
const.remark: comma separated list of connected feedback module addresses

const.name: getLoco
const.remark: Get the properties reference of a loco. arg=lcid

var.name: decoders
var.remark: comma separated list of decoder bus values.

var.name: modules
var.remark: comma separated list of connected feedback module addresses

bincmd.remark: Binary command; the DigInt should send the bytes un-translated to the command station.

var.name: out
var.remark: one byte represented by 2 ascii chars; StrOp.byteToStr()

var.name: inendbyte
var.remark: Read response until detecting this byte within the inlen.

var.name: data
var.remark: one byte represented by 2 ascii chars; StrOp.byteToStr()

const.name: datarsp
const.remark: data response from previous get command

const.name: mprsp
const.remark: multi port data response from previous get command

const.name: nnreq
const.remark: Node number request for new module with 'modid'.

var.name: acc
var.remark: POM Program On the Main for accessory decoders

var.name: accext
var.remark: POM Program On the Main for extended accessory decoders

var.name: decaddr
var.remark: decoder address in case of POM

var.name: modid
var.remark: module id for use with lncv

const.name: porttype_backlight
const.remark: BiDiB uses 6 for this type but it will be corrected in the bidib library.

var.name: cmd
var.remark: External program or script to be executed

var.name: id
var.remark: Booster ID; command for all not set.

var.name: id
var.remark: Booster ID; command for all not set.

const.name: stoplocs
const.remark: Command to switch of the automatic mode of all locos.

const.name: stop
const.remark: Command to turn off track power.

const.name: go
const.remark: Command to turn on track power.

const.name: hfi
const.remark: Set HF light level for analog systems

const.name: checksetup
const.remark: Check of all decoders are online. The valStr has a CSV bus list.

var.name: onghost
var.remark: Command triggered by a ghost train.

var.name: wio
var.remark: send command to all WIO clients

const.name: themes
const.remark: Request the themes to use with the plan.

var.name: disablemonitor
var.remark: Client do not want to receive monitor messages embedded in exception wrappers.(iRoc)

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

item.remark: Message to change type, position and orientation of an item.

var.name: modid
var.remark: module ID for internal use only

var.name: routeids
var.remark: comma separated list of route ids used to show a special route representation

var.name: prev_id
var.remark: in case of an id change this should help to find the original in the table

var.name: userdata
var.remark: user data for use in scripting

var.name: cx
var.remark: Zero means not set; use default symbol size.

var.name: generated
var.remark: On the fly generated for an unknown address. Triggered by a client.

var.name: autogen
var.remark: On the fly generated for an unknown address. Triggered by a client.

var.name: altsvg
var.remark: Allow alternating between two SVG containers.

var.name: used
var.remark: Temp. flag for show usage in the index description column.

modplan.remark: Root node of the module master plan.

var.name: routes
var.remark: File name of route and schedule definitions.

var.name: modified
var.remark: Flags module as modified by the GUI. (Internal use only)

var.name: savemodplan
var.remark: Make sure locs and routes are in separate files and not part of a module!

var.name: savemodules
var.remark: Leave modules un touched if set to false, but all changes are lost.

var.name: modroutes
var.remark: Use internal module routes in conjunction with connections.

var.name: title
var.remark: Text to show in the tab.

var.name: filename
var.remark: File name of module track plan.

var.name: x
var.remark: x position on an overview panel

var.name: y
var.remark: y position on an overview panel

var.name: id
var.remark: Module ID; for internal use only.

var.name: modid
var.remark: Module ID which connects to this module.

modocc.remark: Root node of the block occupancy.

var.name: placing
var.remark: Loco placing: 0 = Not set, 1 = True, 2 = False

var.name: blockenterside
var.remark: Block enter side: 0 = Not set, 1 = True, 2 = False

var.name: closed
var.remark: Signal this block as closed: Out of order.

var.name: auto
var.remark: The occupying loco is in automode.

var.name: mustbetrue
var.remark: This condition must be true, also in case allconditions is false.

var.name: mappedfn
var.remark: Mapped function number in case of other address then main decodcer.

var.name: rocguiversion
var.remark: Rocgui version at last save of a local plan.

var.name: rocrailversion
var.remark: Rocrail version at last save of a plan.

var.name: modplan
var.remark: Flags the Rocview if it is assembled from a modular layout definition.

var.name: themes
var.remark: Preferred themes for redndering this plan by Rocviews.

var.name: donkey
var.remark: Flags if a valid donation key is found.

var.name: accs
var.remark: Output and switche IDs as csv.

var.name: outputs
var.remark: Comma separated list of outputs from east to west.

var.name: deactivate
var.remark: Comma separated list of outputs to deactivate at start.

var.name: slidingdaylightminbri
var.remark: Minimal brightness percentage for all lamps.

var.name: outputs
var.remark: Comma separated list of outputs from lightning.

var.name: modviewx
var.remark: x position on an overview panel

var.name: modviewy
var.remark: y position on an overview panel

var.name: modviewcx
var.remark: x size on an overview panel

var.name: modviewcy
var.remark: y size on an overview panel

var.name: scopt_poweroffall
var.remark: Power off all boosters at shortcut.

var.name: scopt_stoplocos
var.remark: Stop all locos in the district at shortcut.

var.name: scopt_repoweron
var.remark: Repower on incase the shortcut is cleared.

var.name: distanceR
var.remark: Distance between the two events in reverse direction.

var.name: record
var.remark: Record the results in a file.

var.name: shortid
var.remark: Short IDs are used for throttle displays.

var.name: useshortid
var.remark: Use short ID to send to throttle.

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: addr2
var.remark: decoder address in case of type 3way

var.name: frogtimer
var.remark: If set to zero the wiring event is used.

var.name: twinaddr
var.remark: Flat system with two addresses for dual coil motor.

var.name: exclude
var.remark: Exclude from router as command in generated routes.

var.name: fromoutput
var.remark: Command is from an oputput object.

var.name: delaytime
var.remark: Delay timer for internal use only.

var.name: actdelay
var.remark: if false: delay is programmed in central unit or module

const.name: right
const.remark: 3way switch right command or right switch type.

const.name: left
const.remark: 3way switch left command or left switch type.

var.name: manualcmd
var.remark: Manual command issued from a client.

const.name: unlocked
const.remark: Place holder for locid not set.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loc who locked this switch.

var.name: fbOcc
var.remark: Optional feedback for occupancy to block commands.

var.name: fbOcc2
var.remark: Optional feedback for occupancy to block commands.

const.name: accessory
const.remark: Accessory representation, but act like a switch.

var.name: prot
var.remark: Protocol to use for this output.

var.name: ctcbus1
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbus2
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbusled1
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcportled1
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: ctcbusled2
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcportled2
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: delay
var.remark: Seconds to elaps to go back to the closed position.

var.name: lockroutes
var.remark: Routes to lock at open, and unlock at close.

var.name: freeblocks
var.remark: Blocks which must be free at open and close.

var.name: resetid
var.remark: Sensor to reset the signal to the red aspect.

var.name: freeid
var.remark: Object must be free to beable to change the signal aspect.

var.name: manual
var.remark: operator controlled signal to influence auto mode

var.name: manualreset
var.remark: operator controlled signal reset automatically to red

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: pair
var.remark: both gates are used for on-off

var.name: asswitch
var.remark: send a switch command incase of 2 aspects

var.name: actdelay
var.remark: if false: delay is programmed in central unit or module

var.name: prot
var.remark: Protocol to use for this output.

var.name: symbolprefix
var.remark: Optional symbol name prefix for multiaspect signals.

var.name: usesymbolprefix
var.remark: Use symbol prefix for aspects less then 5.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loco who locked this signal.

var.name: ctcbus1
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbus2
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbus3
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbusled1
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcportled1
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: ctcbusled2
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcportled2
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: ctcbusled3
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcportled3
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: port
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: inv
var.remark: Output as switch inverted. (Software wiring correction)

var.name: delay
var.remark: Turn off after x seconds if greater then 0

var.name: showbri
var.remark: Show renderred brightness for color type.

var.name: colortype
var.remark: The output supports RGB color settings.

var.name: plancolor
var.remark: Use color as plan panel background.

var.name: prot
var.remark: Protocol to use for this output.

var.name: svgtype
var.remark: Defines which SVG symbol should be used in case of show.

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ignoresamestate
var.remark: Ignore events with the same state.

var.name: ctcbus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcport
var.remark: port of decoder module: 0 = not used.

var.name: countedcars
var.remark: number of cars to count before firing the event. (only for client info)

var.name: regtrigger
var.remark: trigger selection which register units to use.

var.name: fbtype
var.remark: feedback type reported by the device

var.name: shortcut
var.remark: Shortcut reported by the cutout sensor; Red background in Rocview.

var.name: error
var.remark: Error detected. For example an invalid RFID tag.

var.name: resetwc
var.remark: Send a reset commando in case of a wheel counter type.

var.name: trainonly
var.remark: Locos are only allowed in case it has a train/operator assigned.

var.name: minocc
var.remark: minimal tracks to be occupied before leaving the location

var.name: scheduletable
var.remark: Create and maintain a schedule table.

var.name: scheduletablehtml
var.remark: Format the schedule table in html for actions.

var.name: type
var.remark: how the schedule should be used

var.name: cycles
var.remark: number of runs in case of cycle type: 0 is just one run

var.name: timeframe
var.remark: time frame for accepting a delay

var.name: maxdelay
var.remark: Depart only if the time is not delayed more than this number of minutes.

var.name: blockexitside
var.remark: Block enter side: 0 = Not set, 1 = True, 2 = False

var.name: blockenterside
var.remark: Block enter side: 0 = Both, 1 = True(+), 2 = False(-)

var.name: blockexitside
var.remark: Block exit side: 0 = Both, 1 = True(+), 2 = False(-)

var.name: regularstop
var.remark: If not set the depart time will be ignored.

var.name: text
var.remark: Free text for use with actions.

var.name: remark
var.remark: Free text for use with timetables.

var.name: free2go
var.remark: Block or location must be free before the schedule can start.

var.name: swap
var.remark: swap the loc placing before traveling to this destination

var.name: ignorepermission
var.remark: Ignore the permissions of this destination

var.name: followuponenter
var.remark: Activate the followup schedule on enter to prevent a wait.

var.name: absolute
var.remark: Use absolute time for starting schedules.

var.name: managerid
var.remark: ID of the manager object like FY or TT.

var.name: len
var.remark: Block length to check with train length.

var.name: lenenter2in
var.remark: Distance between enter and in event for virtual timing.

var.name: minlen
var.remark: Minimal train length allowed for this block.

var.name: evttimer
var.remark: event timer; loc should wait this time before processing the event

var.name: evttimer2
var.remark: event timer reverse direction; loc should wait this time before processing the event

var.name: forceblocktimer
var.remark: Force the block event timer to overrule the optional loco event timer.

var.name: departdelay
var.remark: delay time to wait before loco starts when depart is raised

var.name: acceptghost
var.remark: accept a ghosttrain and signal the block occupied.

var.name: sleeponclosed
var.remark: Ignore events in case of closed.

var.name: terminalstation
var.remark: swap placing of an incomming loc to get another default direction.(terminal station)

var.name: allowchgdir
var.remark: Allow using a route in the opposite running direction.

var.name: smallsymbol
var.remark: Show this block with the small representation.

var.name: remote
var.remark: This flag is set by the R2Rnet object.

var.name: rrid
var.remark: This id is set by the R2Rnet object.

var.name: selectshortestblock
var.remark: Select shortest next block in case block and train length are set.

var.name: freeblockonenter
var.remark: Use the enter event to free previous block.

var.name: allowaccessoncars
var.remark: Allow access in case cars are present in the block and the type is not shunting.

var.name: secondnextblock4wait
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block also in case of wait.

var.name: rearprotection
var.remark: Report the loco in the block of unexpected enter events.

var.name: shunting
var.remark: Is this block used for shunting?

var.name: check2in
var.remark: Check for a free new destination between the enter and in event.

var.name: fifosize
var.remark: FiFo size; Must be greater then 0 to be active.

var.name: fifogap
var.remark: FiFo gap; Room between the cars and trucks.

var.name: tdV0
var.remark: Reset V to zero after an unlink command.

var.name: tdlinkblocks
var.remark: Use the link mechanism for destination blocks.

var.name: mvdistance
var.remark: Distance between the enter and in event.

var.name: extstop
var.remark: An external stop module will take over the throttle. Use only with enter2in! (Lenz ABC.)

var.name: updateenterside
var.remark: For internal use only: Event for updating the loco block enter side only.

const.name: closed
const.remark: In this state the block is not chooseable for locs.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loc which is actualy in the block or is comming or going.

var.name: fifoids
var.remark: CSV list of all FiFo IDs.

var.name: manual
var.remark: Block not chooseable for locs in auto-mode if set to true.

var.name: wait
var.remark: Should the loc wait in this block?

const.name: wait_fixed
const.remark: Wait a fixed period of time.

const.name: wait_loc
const.remark: Takes the loc wait time as defined in lc.

var.name: waittime
var.remark: Wait time in case of wait_fixed.

var.name: minwaittime
var.remark: Min. wait time in case of wait_random.

var.name: maxwaittime
var.remark: Max. wait time in case of wait_random.

var.name: reservedevents
var.remark: Only process events in case the block is reserved.

var.name: stopspeed
var.remark: Block speed on arrive and stop.

var.name: noreduceonexit
var.remark: Use block speed on departure only if it does not reduce the current loco speed.

var.name: maxkmh
var.remark: Block max. speed in km/h or mph.

var.name: signalR
var.remark: Home Signal ID for reverse direction. (sw)

var.name: wsignalR
var.remark: Warning Signal ID for reverse direction. (sw)

var.name: statesignal
var.remark: State Signal ID for loco info.

var.name: electrified
var.remark: Block is open for electric locs.

var.name: engine
var.remark: See locomotive engine types. If empty, not set, all engine types are allowed.

var.name: class
var.remark: Comma separated list of permitted classes.

var.name: typeperm
var.remark: Only allow this type of trains.

var.name: totallength
var.remark: Temporary calculated stageblock length for viewing usage only. (Dialog)

var.name: totalsections
var.remark: Temporary calculated number of sections for viewing usage only. (Dialog)

var.name: remote
var.remark: This flag is set by the R2Rnet object.

var.name: rrid
var.remark: This id is set by the R2Rnet object.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loc which is actualy in the block or is comming or going.

var.name: departdelay
var.remark: delay time to wait before loco starts when depart is raised

var.name: waittime
var.remark: Wait time in case of wait_fixed.

var.name: minwaittime
var.remark: Min. wait time in case of wait_random.

var.name: maxwaittime
var.remark: Max. wait time in case of wait_random.

var.name: stopspeed
var.remark: Block speed on arrive and stop.

var.name: stopspeedtolastsection
var.remark: Use the stop speed also for running to the last section

var.name: inatlen
var.remark: In event if train length fits in the current sections.

var.name: usewd
var.remark: Use a watchdog for compressing when needed.

var.name: minoccsec
var.remark: Minimal section occupation before exit block.

const.name: open
const.remark: In this state the block is chooseable for locs to enter.

const.name: closed
const.remark: In this state the block is not chooseable for locs to enter.

const.name: exitopen
const.remark: In this state the block is chooseable for locs to depart.

const.name: exitclosed
const.remark: In this state the block is not chooseable for locs to depart.

var.name: movetimeout
var.remark: Pending move timeout on compress command.

var.name: electrified
var.remark: Stage is open for electric locs.

var.name: class
var.remark: Comma separated list of permitted classes.

var.name: typeperm
var.remark: Only allow this type of trains.

var.name: smallsymbol
var.remark: Show this stage with the small representation.

var.name: vmintofirstsection
var.remark: Use always Vmin if the target section is the first.

link.remark: in case of critsect the src is ignored and all blocks listed in dst are group members

const.name: usage_critsect
const.remark: group is used as a critical section

var.name: allowfollowup
var.remark: Allow follow up in critsec for the same direction.

var.name: active
var.remark: Activates links: all blocks are set to manual mode.

var.name: dst
var.remark: destination blocks; id's in CSV format

var.name: free
var.remark: One of this blocks must be free. (csv)

var.name: reserve
var.remark: Reserve one of the free blocks.

var.name: schedule
var.remark: One of the free blocks must be in the active loco schedule.

st.remark: A street defines a destination fromone block to another including switch positions.

var.name: len
var.remark: Total length of route to calculate the virtual event timer.

var.name: skipfinder
var.remark: Skip this route for the Finder.

const.name: routelock
const.remark: id to signal FY and TT a route lock/unlock

var.name: bka
var.remark: From block ID: $ prefix is a NetRocrail ID.

var.name: bkb
var.remark: To block ID: $ prefix is a NetRocrail ID.

var.name: bkc
var.remark: Crossing block: optional incase a block overlaps turnouts used by this route. This is a csv list of blocks.

var.name: shunting
var.remark: Is this route used for shunting?

var.name: usestack
var.remark: Use this route on the loco stack for calculation preferred.

var.name: swappost
var.remark: swap loco placing at terminating this route

var.name: reduceaspect
var.remark: Aspect to be used in case white aspect.

var.name: thrownswitches
var.remark: overrules looking for thrown switches in the command list

var.name: crossingblocksignals
var.remark: Set the signals in the crossing blocks according to the from block.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loco which has locked this route.

const.name: cmd_track
const.remark: track of turntable or selectiontable: avoid using same id's for both types!

var.name: lock
var.remark: lock the switch for exclusive use

var.name: check
var.remark: Check if the switch is in the wanted position.

var.name: atfree
var.remark: command should be fired at a free event

var.name: invert
var.remark: Invert polarisation in case of trackdriver systems.

var.name: mode
var.remark: Only use this command for the selected mode: 0=all, 1=automatic, 2=manual

const.name: go
const.remark: Switch all switches for this street.

const.name: force
const.remark: Switch all switches for this street. (Manually)

const.name: test
const.remark: Switch all switches for this street without sending the clients updates.

var.name: speed
var.remark: Route speed on departure; overwrites block departure speed if set.

var.name: maxkmh
var.remark: Route max. speed in km/h or mph.

var.name: speedWait
var.remark: Route speed on departure; overwrites block departure speed if set.

var.name: maxkmhWait
var.remark: Route max. speed in km/h or mph.

var.name: speedShunt
var.remark: Route speed on departure; overwrites block departure speed if set.

var.name: maxkmhShunt
var.remark: Route max. speed in km/h or mph.

var.name: class
var.remark: Comma separated list of permitted classes.

var.name: typeperm
var.remark: Only allow this type of trains.

var.name: engine
var.remark: Only allow this type of engines.

var.name: maxlen
var.remark: Maximal train length allowed for this route.

var.name: minlen
var.remark: Minimal train length allowed for this route.

var.name: countcars
var.remark: Count number of cars before firing events.

var.name: polarizationB
var.remark: To Block or turntable bridge polarisation: 0=none 1=false 2=true

var.name: ctcbus1
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbus2
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: ctcbus3
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: includeconditions
var.remark: The conditions are to include locos. If one of the conditions is true? Include or Exclude

var.name: allowschedules
var.remark: Allow schedules to use this route.

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: motoroffdelay
var.remark: shut off delay for locdec motor

var.name: move4opp
var.remark: Move bridge if the target track is opposite of the current position.

var.name: psen
var.remark: ID of the position ready sensor

var.name: manager
var.remark: Manager mode: Act like a block and manage all sub blocks.(Tracks)

var.name: swcmd
var.remark: use switch instead of output commands

const.name: accdec
const.remark: Controlling a modified turntable with switch commands.

var.name: actfn
var.remark: Activation function for locdec type turntable drives.

var.name: s1
var.remark: Feedback ID for detection occupancy on the bridge.

var.name: s2
var.remark: Feedback ID for detection occupancy on the bridge.

var.name: sMid
var.remark: Feedback ID for detection occupancy on the bridge.

var.name: sMid2
var.remark: Feedback ID for detection occupancy on the bridge.

const.name: unlocked
const.remark: Place holder for locid not set.

var.name: locid
var.remark: The loc who locked this turntable.

var.name: pause
var.remark: pause between direction and position command

var.name: posfb
var.remark: Feedback ID for positioning the TT.

var.name: oppositetrack
var.remark: Opposite track to do a 180 degree turn.

var.name: polarization
var.remark: Flip bridge polarization when entering this track.

var.name: gridconx
var.remark: Grid X connection in units of 0.5 grid size.

var.name: gridcony
var.remark: Grid Y connection in units of 0.5 grid size.

var.name: prev_id
var.remark: in case of an id change this should help to find the original in the loc table

var.name: cvnrs
var.remark: predefined CV's for read,write and copy all

var.name: screcord
var.remark: Record all in blocks as schedule.

var.name: decoupler
var.remark: If the loco has a decoupler function.

var.name: image
var.remark: Image file with side 1 to the right.

var.name: image2
var.remark: Image file with side 2 to the right.

var.name: shortid
var.remark: Short IDs are used for throttle displays.

var.name: usefinder
var.remark: Use the Finder in case of a gotoblock command.

var.name: useshortid
var.remark: Use short ID to send to throttle.

var.name: lookupschedule
var.remark: Look up a schedule which fits location, class and time.

var.name: reducespeedatenter
var.remark: Reduce speed at enter if the next route has thrown switches.

var.name: check2in
var.remark: Check for a free new destination between the enter and in event.

var.name: camskip
var.remark: Skip number of frames to reduce CPU.

var.name: throttleid
var.remark: Throttle ID to which this loco is dispatched.

var.name: throttlenr
var.remark: Throttle number for receiving the short id.

var.name: identifier
var.remark: Loc identifier incase of RFID, Lissy, Barcode...

var.name: prev_id
var.remark: in case of an id change this should help to find the original in the loc table

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: usesecaddr
var.remark: Use secondary address for speed commands.

var.name: port
var.remark: Block number in the Dinamo system. (Block property)

var.name: len
var.remark: Total length of loc with wagons to check with block length..

var.name: nrcars
var.remark: Number of cars. Needed for counting in sensors.

var.name: secondnextblock
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block.

var.name: secondnextblock4wait
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block also in case of wait.

var.name: resumeauto
var.remark: Resume auto mode from previous session.

var.name: shortin
var.remark: Use shortin event to stop in blocks.

var.name: inatpre2in
var.remark: Use pre2in event to stop in blocks.

var.name: usedepartdelay
var.remark: Use the depart delay defined in the current block.

var.name: freeblockonenter
var.remark: Use the enter event to free previous block.

var.name: routestack
var.remark: Use route stack for route random preffered value.

const.name: V_mode_percent
const.remark: use 30 incase of mins=4, 70 incase of maxs=10... (Replaces attr controlled)

var.name: V_mode
var.remark: How the V values should be interpreted by the digint: percent is used for decoders without max speed tuning.(Delta...)

var.name: V_raw
var.remark: Loc speed in CS speed steps.

var.name: V_rawMax
var.remark: Max loc speed in CS speed steps.

var.name: V_step
var.remark: Time between next decoder speed.(used only incase of V_mode_percent)

var.name: Vmaxmax
var.remark: Maximal Vmax value in case of a calibrate command.

var.name: Vmaxmin
var.remark: Minimal Vmax value in case of a calibrate command.

var.name: Vmidpercent
var.remark: Percentage of Vmax in case of a calibrate command.

var.name: mass
var.remark: Mass index for use with accelerate and decelerate.

var.name: invdir
var.remark: Flip direction instead of programming the decoder cv29.

var.name: v0onswap
var.remark: Command V0 on swap to inform the decoder.

var.name: roaming
var.remark: The roaming flag allows a loc traveling to other systems.

var.name: swapondir
var.remark: Swap in case of direction change in manual or half automatic mode.

var.name: dirpause
var.remark: pause after sending last turnout command and before sending the direction to the loc decoder

var.name: priority
var.remark: train priority used for multiplying the wait time if no destination is found

var.name: forcepriority
var.remark: Forcer train priority independent of train type.

var.name: prot
var.remark: P = protocol by server, M = Marklin, N = NMRA-DCC, L = NMRA-DCC long addresses, A = Analog, C= Car Decoder

var.name: fx
var.remark: Function status bits for display only.

var.name: restorefxalways
var.remark: Restore functions from previouse session at each power on command.

var.name: active
var.remark: Active for running in auto mode.

var.name: manually
var.remark: Manually started; Ignore start all locos.

var.name: resetplacing
var.remark: Reset placing and direction at server startup.

var.name: engineFxType
var.remark: Engine type in case Fx is active.

var.name: sw
var.remark: Change direction in P50 protocol.(Use dir=true/false)

const.name: stop
const.remark: Stop loc in next or current block.

const.name: stopfollowup
const.remark: Stop loco at the end of schedule or tour with followup.

const.name: deactivate
const.remark: Prevent loco from being started in auto mode.

const.name: activate
const.remark: Allow loco being started in auto mode.

const.name: block
const.remark: Set loc in the supplied block.

const.name: gobyblock
const.remark: Set wanted block to pass through.

const.name: gotoblockselect
const.remark: Use Finder to show all avaiable paths.

const.name: addblock2trip
const.remark: Add a block to the trip.

const.name: release
const.remark: Release loco from throttle: The releasing throttle must provide the throttleid.

const.name: reset
const.remark: Stop immidiately and go to idle mode.

const.name: regularreset
const.remark: Stop immidiately, go to idle mode, save current block and remove the assigned schedule.

const.name: softreset
const.remark: Stop immidiately and go to idle mode, save current block.

const.name: shortid
const.remark: Send the short ID to the command station.

const.name: info
const.remark: Ask the command station for loco info.

var.name: minenergypercentage
var.remark: Minimal energy percentage. If its get below: go home

var.name: blockenterid
var.remark: Block ID which has been entered. The blockid should be used if not set.

var.name: waitallblocks
var.remark: Wait in all blocks to lean BBT.

var.name: waitallblocksalt
var.remark: Wait alternately in all blocks to lean BBT.

var.name: maxwaittime
var.remark: Max. wait time in block by priority.

var.name: evttimer
var.remark: event timer; loc should wait this time before processing the event

var.name: ent2incorr
var.remark: Correction percentage for enter2in block timer

var.name: swaptimer
var.remark: Swap placing timer; Loco should wait this time before processing the swap.

var.name: info4throttle
var.remark: Get loco info if it is stalled and not in automode.

var.name: fifotop
var.remark: Loco is on top of a location FiFo.

var.name: reserveside
var.remark: Reserve side of the block trip.

var.name: modeevent
var.remark: Flag for filter out at broadcast.

var.name: modeblock
var.remark: Loco mode block, NULL in case of current block.

var.name: cvnrs
var.remark: predefined CV's for read,write and copy all

var.name: consist_lightsoff
var.remark: Keep lights turned off for all slave locos.

var.name: consist_synclights
var.remark: Synchronise lights for all slave locos.

var.name: consist_syncfun
var.remark: Synchronise functions for all slave locos.

var.name: consistcmd
var.remark: Consist context command; Flag for preventing loops.

var.name: bbtevent
var.remark: Flag for filter out at broadcast.

var.name: generatein
var.remark: Generate an IN event at the last BBT step.

var.name: count
var.remark: Counter for dynamically adjust the correction factor.

var.name: blockenterside
var.remark: Block enter side: 0 = Not set, 1 = True, 2 = False

var.name: length
var.remark: The length to be used if no cars are added to the train.

var.name: fx
var.remark: Function status bits for display only.

var.name: fdesconly
var.remark: shiftonly and fdesconly are mutual exclusive

var.name: shortin
var.remark: Use shortin event to stop in blocks.

var.name: inatpre2in
var.remark: Use pre2in event to stop in blocks.

var.name: secondnextblock
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block.

var.name: secondnextblock4wait
var.remark: Try to reserve a second next block also in case of wait.

var.name: freeblockonenter
var.remark: Use the enter event to free previous block.

var.name: usedepartdelay
var.remark: Use the depart delay defined in the current block.

var.name: image
var.remark: image file to show in dialogs

var.name: subtype
var.remark: Car sub type like Boxcar or gondola.

var.name: waybill
var.remark: Option for freight cars; where to go and what to load.

var.name: f0vcmd
var.remark: Use a speed command for F0.

var.name: camskip
var.remark: Skip number of frames to reduce CPU.

var.name: text
var.remark: Text or Image (if ending on .png) to be displayed.

var.name: prev_id
var.remark: in case of an id change this should help to find the original in the table

var.name: clock
var.remark: Is used to show the model time.

var.name: type
var.remark: type [ext] is an external program or script to be executed

var.name: activate
var.remark: action activation at state ON or OFF: default is ON(true)

var.name: timer
var.remark: Timer in ms before activation this action.

var.name: cmd
var.remark: on, off or an external program or script to be executed

var.name: param
var.remark: command parameter like schedule id for lc

var.name: refid
var.remark: Reference ID for getting more information for this action.

var.name: bus
var.remark: Some systems support more than one bus: SLX

var.name: addr4
var.remark: decoder address to signal new position

var.name: port4
var.remark: port of decoder unit to signal new position.

var.name: sharedfb
var.remark: Use one set of sensors for all blocks.

var.name: manager
var.remark: Manager mode: Act like a block and manage all sub blocks.(Tracks)

var.name: minocc
var.remark: minimal tracks to be occupied before leaving the fiddle yard

var.name: movedelay
var.remark: delay in seconds after an IN event before processing a new move

var.name: prot
var.remark: protocol to use for this seltab

var.name: psen
var.remark: ID of the position ready sensor

var.name: s1id
var.remark: sensor 1 id for optical feedback of the selected position

var.name: s2id
var.remark: sensor 2 id for optical feedback of the selected position
